# Task → Skill Mapping – Full Reference

**Purpose:** Complete mapping for skills-auto-detect. Used when grouped overview in skills-auto-detect.mdc is insufficient.

**Auto-generated from** `30_system/SKILLS/registry.json` via `python 40_operations/scripts/skill_registry.py generate`.

---

## Full Table

| Task / keywords (en) | Skill file to load | Domain | Disambiguation |
|---|---|---|---|
| Agentic OS, Re-Act OS, TAOR, Think Act Observe Reflect, Tree of Thought debugging, verbose agent loop, @agentic-os | `SKILL_agentic-react-os.md` | engineering | Use for explicit Agentic OS / Re-Act execution discipline and TAOR checkpoints; NOT a substitute for domain analysis skills (meta-analysis, etc.). For software PRD workflow use grill-me → write-prd → prd-to-issues → ralph-loop instead. |
| check AI score, AI detection, reduce AI phrasing, natural writing | `SKILL_ai-detection.md` | writing | Use when checking/reducing AI detection score on existing text; for writing strategy guidance use avoid-ai-formulations instead |
| avoid AI phrasing, natural writing, AI formulations, reduce AI score | `SKILL_avoid-ai-formulations.md` | writing | Use for writing strategy and phrase-level revision on academic or non-academic drafts; for automated AI score checking use ai-detection instead. May pair as second Tier 3 skill with nonacademic-writer or manuscript-structure per registry tier3_pairing. |
| Bayesian, prior, posterior, Bayes workflow, brms | `SKILL_bayesian-workflow.md` | statistics | Use for full Bayesian analysis workflow (priors, fitting, diagnostics, reporting) in R/brms; NOT for frequentist analyses or Python statsmodels unless user switches stack |
| exploratory analysis, EDA, explorativna analiza, flexplot, visual EDA, vizualna eksplorativna analiza, explore variables, explore data before analysis | `SKILL_eda-flexplot.md` | statistics | Use for EDA then visual EDA via flexplot script; mandatory pause to present results and suggest options; then user picks next skill (test-selection, meta-analysis, etc.). Do NOT run inferential analysis in same turn. |
| case report, case series, prikaz slučaja, serija slučajeva, write case report, write case series, CARE checklist, case report structure | `SKILL_case-report-series.md` | writing | Use for writing or structuring case reports and case series; follow CARE. For CARE checklist check only use reporting-care.mdc; for general article structure use manuscript-structure. |
| CONSORT, RCT checklist, randomized trial reporting | `SKILL_consort-checklist.md` | methodology | Use for CONSORT compliance check on RCT manuscripts; for writing RCT structure use rct-manuscript. |
| document conversion, Word to txt, docx to md, Excel to markdown, convert document | `SKILL_document-conversion.md` | tools | Use for file format conversion between docx/xlsx/txt/md only |
| OCR, paddleocr, paddle ocr, scan PDF, scanned PDF, extract text from image, image OCR | `SKILL_paddle-ocr.md` | tools | Use for scanned PDFs/images and PaddleOCR install/extract pipeline; for docx/xlsx conversion use document-conversion; default PDF library extract uses --ocr auto in extract_pdf_library_to_md.py |
| figure pipeline, publication figures, all figures, visualization for paper | `SKILL_figure-pipeline.md` | figures | Use when multiple publication figures are needed; for a single forest plot use forest-plot directly |
| forest plot, meta-analysis figure, study results visualization | `SKILL_forest-plot.md` | statistics | Use for creating a single forest plot; for full figure workflow use figure-pipeline instead |
| GRADE, quality of evidence, certainty assessment, evidence grading | `SKILL_grade-assessment.md` | methodology | Use for GRADE certainty-of-evidence assessment across outcomes; NOT for individual study risk-of-bias tools |
| manuscript structure, IMRaD, check article structure, section check, does it have all sections | `SKILL_manuscript-structure.md` | writing | Use for structural completeness check (IMRaD sections) on journal-bound work; for full write/edit/QC workflow use manuscript-writing; for blog/newsletter use nonacademic-writer; for prose quality use avoid-ai-formulations (pairing allowed per tier3_pairing). |
| write manuscript, piši manuskript, edit manuscript, uredi manuskript, manuscript protocol, prepare submission, priprema za submission, position paper, cohort manuscript, CRAB colistin | `SKILL_manuscript-writing.md` | writing | Use for end-to-end manuscript draft, edit, or pre-submission QC. Load 59_manuscript_writing_principles.md (conceptual) then 58 protocol (operational): file hygiene, integrity check, style, stats reporting, weighted score gate, stop on N mismatch. Pair with study-type skills. For IMRaD checklist only use manuscript-structure; for AI phrases only avoid-ai-formulations; NOT blog/newsletter. |
| obsidian wiki, Obsidian ingest, wiki ingestion, wikilink graph, wiki health check, wiki lint, graph connectivity, Karpathy wiki, second brain, LLM Wiki Mode, Obsidian tricks, Obsidian skill, Obsidian flavored markdown, OFM, wikilink, callout, transclusion, JSON Canvas, canvas file, Obsidian Bases, vault note, PKM, osobna baza znanja, napravi bilješku Obsidian, Obsidian URI | `SKILL_obsidian-wiki-agent.md` | tools | Use for Obsidian-native markdown and vault/wiki ops under 20_knowledge/wiki (ingest, syntax, Canvas, Bases, connectivity). NOT for systematic review methodology as a study type (use literature-synthesis or meta-analysis). |
| meta-analysis, meta analiza, systematic review, sustavni pregled, systematic review and meta-analysis, combine studies, pooled estimate, systematic review quantitative | `SKILL_meta-analysis.md` | statistics | Use for conducting full systematic review and/or meta-analysis (protocol, search, screening, extraction, RoB, pooling, forest plot, publication bias). For PRISMA compliance check on existing manuscript only use prisma-checklist; for narrative synthesis/grid/gaps without mandatory MA use literature-synthesis; for single forest plot use forest-plot. |
| retrospective cohort, retrospektivna kohortna studija, kohortna studija, write cohort study, pisanje kohortne studije, observational cohort, cohort study manuscript | `SKILL_retrospective-cohort.md` | writing | Use for writing or structuring retrospective cohort manuscripts; follow STROBE. For STROBE checklist check only use strobe-checklist; for case-control or cross-sectional use strobe-checklist with study-specific items. |
| prospective cohort, prospektivna kohortna studija, write prospective cohort, pisanje prospektivne kohortne studije, longitudinal cohort | `SKILL_prospective-cohort.md` | writing | Use for writing or structuring prospective cohort manuscripts; follow STROBE. For retrospective cohort use retrospective-cohort; for checklist check use strobe-checklist. |
| observational study, opservacijska studija, write observational study, pisanje opservacijske studije, case-control, cross-sectional, presječna studija, studija slučaj-kontrola | `SKILL_observational-studies.md` | writing | Use for writing case-control or cross-sectional manuscripts; STROBE by design. For cohort use prospective-cohort or retrospective-cohort; for checklist check use strobe-checklist. |
| RCT, randomized controlled trial, randomizirana kontrolirana studija, write RCT, pisanje RCT-a, clinical trial manuscript, CONSORT writing | `SKILL_rct-manuscript.md` | writing | Use for writing or structuring RCT manuscripts; follow CONSORT. For CONSORT checklist compliance check only use consort-checklist. |
| PRISMA, systematic review checklist, PRISMA 2020 | `SKILL_prisma-checklist.md` | methodology | Use to check SR/MA manuscript against PRISMA 2020 (compliance check only). To conduct the SR/MA workflow use meta-analysis; for RCTs use consort-checklist; for observational use strobe-checklist. |
| publication bias, funnel plot, small-study effects, Egger test | `SKILL_publication-bias.md` | statistics | Use specifically for publication bias assessment (funnel, Egger, trim-and-fill); requires completed meta-analysis with k >= 10 |
| sensitivity analysis, robustness checks, leave-one-out, influence analysis | `SKILL_sensitivity-analysis.md` | statistics | Use for meta-analysis sensitivity analyses (leave-one-out, influence, method comparison); NOT for general statistical sensitivity analysis outside meta-analysis |
| setup project, create project, initialize project | `SKILL_setup-project.md` | setup | Use to create new project directory structure; for checking existing structure use validate-setup |
| STROBE, observational study checklist, cohort reporting, case-control reporting | `SKILL_strobe-checklist.md` | methodology | Use for observational studies (cohort, case-control, cross-sectional); for RCTs use consort-checklist; for systematic reviews use prisma-checklist |
| swiss cheese, validation protocol, validate task, verification protocol | `SKILL_swiss-cheese.md` | validation | Use for multi-layer validation of critical analyses; mandatory before publication or writing transition |
| target trial, emulation, causal inference design, comparative effectiveness | `SKILL_target-trial-emulation.md` | statistics | Use when emulating an RCT from observational data; NOT for actual RCTs or standard observational analysis |
| which test, test selection, Welch, comparison of groups, statistical test choice, power analysis, sample size, multiple comparison, assumption check | `SKILL_test-selection.md` | statistics | Default R-oriented test choice and reporting (Welch, effect sizes, K-Dense references); for full R implementation and package catalog use r-statistics; NOT for meta-analysis, Bayesian workflow, or Python statsmodels implementation |
| validate setup, check project structure, verify setup | `SKILL_validate-setup.md` | setup | Use to verify existing project structure is correct; for creating new structure use setup-project |
| create SOP, standard operating procedure, document procedure, record fix | `SKILL_create-sop.md` | methodology | Use to document multi-step fixes or complex integrations as reusable SOPs; NOT for simple error logging |
| literature review, lit review, synthesis, analysis grid, consensus meter, gap identification, research gap, critical review | `SKILL_literature-synthesis.md` | writing | Use for narrative synthesis, analysis grid, evidence agreement table (consensus meter), gap identification (no mandatory quantitative pooling). NOT Consensus.app MCP (use research-lookup). For blog or newsletter drafts use nonacademic-writer; for full systematic review or meta-analysis workflow use meta-analysis; for PRISMA check use prisma-checklist; for manuscript structure use manuscript-structure. |
| graphify, brain map, codebase graph, architecture query, god nodes, structural index, what connects, shortest path, graph query, map the brain, graphify query, knowledge graph brain | `SKILL_graphify-brain-map.md` | engineering | Use for agent-rules repo structure and cross-module wiring (Graphify MCP/CLI). NOT Obsidian wiki (obsidian-wiki-agent), session memory (memory MCP), or textbooks (books_rag). |
| Grill-me, grill me, shared understanding, interview before coding, design tree, clarify requirements | `SKILL_grill-me.md` | engineering | Use for structured interview and design-tree alignment before coding or PRD; NOT for statistical grill-down of data |
| Write PRD, product requirements, prd.json, PRD, requirements document, passes flag | `SKILL_write-prd.md` | engineering | Use for software Product Requirements Document with passes flags; NOT for PRISMA systematic review checklist (use prisma-checklist) |
| PRD to issues, vertical slice, vertical slices, decompose PRD, tracer bullet, task breakdown | `SKILL_prd-to-issues.md` | engineering | Use to break a PRD into vertical slices and blockers; load after write-prd when planning execution |
| Ralph ON, Ralph OFF, Ralph loop, Ralph Wiggum, PROMISE COMPLETE, Exploration Mode, autonomous execution | `SKILL_ralph-loop.md` | engineering | Use for PRD-driven iterative execution with TDD and progress logging; NOT for research statistics pipelines unless user explicitly names Ralph mode |
| R statistics, R statistika, R analiza, biostatistics R, clinical statistics R, napiši R kod, R script analysis, glmmTMB, lme4, survival analysis R, gtsummary, ggstatsplot, MatchIt, mice imputation, tidymodels, mlr3, paketi za statistiku | `SKILL_r-statistics.md` | statistics | Use for R biostatistics implementation, package selection, and reproducible analysis scripts. For test choice only use test-selection; for full Bayesian workflow use bayesian-workflow; for SR/MA protocol use meta-analysis; for EDA pause workflow use eda-flexplot; for Python use statsmodels-python. |
| research grill-me, scholarly alignment, PICO interview, clarify study design, before research spec, manuscript scope, opisujem zadatak, describe my task | `SKILL_research-grill-me.md` | scholarly | Use for interview and design-tree alignment before a research spec or manuscript; NOT for software Grill-me before PRD (use grill-me) |
| research spec, research-spec.json, manuscript spec, scholarly spec, SAP outline, write research spec, help create research-spec, make research-spec.json | `SKILL_write-research-spec.md` | scholarly | Use for research/manuscript specification with passes flags (research-spec.json); NOT for software PRD (use write-prd) |
| research milestones, decompose research spec, spec to milestones, analysis milestones, chapter order, tracer bullet research | `SKILL_research-spec-to-milestones.md` | scholarly | Use to break research spec into milestones for statistics and writing; NOT for software vertical slices (use prd-to-issues) |
| LOOP ON, LOOP OFF, run loop, research iteration loop, PROMISE COMPLETE loop, scholarly loop | `SKILL_scholarly-iteration-loop.md` | scholarly | Use for spec-driven scholarly iterations with Swiss Cheese and progress logs; NOT for software Ralph/TDD loop (use ralph-loop) |
| statsmodels, Python regression, OLS Python, ARIMA Python, Python inference, logistic regression Python, GLM Python | `SKILL_statsmodels-python.md` | statistics | Use only when user explicitly requests Python/statsmodels; for default clinical/R analysis use test-selection or bayesian-workflow |
| contract review, review contract, pregled ugovora, NDA, MSA, DPA, data processing agreement, ugovor o suradnji, redline, red flags ugovor, limitation of liability, indemnification, governing law | `SKILL_legal-contract-review.md` | legal | Use for commercial/research contract clause review and redlines with HR/EU playbook; NOT legal advice; NOT for reporting checklists (PRISMA/CONSORT/STROBE) or clinical treatment. |
| skill dag router, skill DAG routing, depends_on skills, pipeline skill order, topological skill load, conflicts_with skills | `SKILL_skill-dag-router.md` | engineering | Inter-skill DAG routing via registry depends_on and skill_pipelines_dag.json; for TF-IDF-only ranking use skill_rerank; for intra-skill steps use skill_decompose (SkillRAE). |
| find skill, skill discovery, external skill, SkillsMP, skills marketplace, nedostaje skill, nema skilla, koji skill, pretraži skill, skill nije integriran, agent skills marketplace | `SKILL_skill-discovery.md` | meta | Use to search local registry and SkillsMP for skills not yet integrated. Run before create-skill when hunting candidates; NOT for performing the underlying domain task. For monthly arXiv preprint skill proposals use arxiv-skill-scout instead. |
| arxiv monthly, arxiv digest, scan arxiv for skills, arxiv skill scout, monthly arxiv scan | `SKILL_arxiv-skill-scout.md` | meta | Monthly arXiv scan for agent/stat/CS skill proposals (CLI + digest); human approval before create-skill. NOT clinical evidence (research-lookup) or SkillsMP import (skill-discovery). |
| long context reasoning agent, longtracerl, rubric reward agent trajectory, tiered distractors benchmark, long context RL agent evaluation | `SKILL_longtracerl-long-context-reason.md` | engineering | Long-context agent eval pattern (LongTraceRL arXiv 2605.31584); not clinical research-lookup. |
| local LLM translation benchmark, confidential translation workflow, offline translation evaluation, translation analytics freelancers, privacy sensitive translation LLM | `SKILL_translation-analytics-freelancers-ii.md` | engineering | Offline local LLM translation benchmarking (arXiv 2605.31452); not document-conversion. |
| scientific research lifecycle agent, autosci memory agent, memory centric research agent, full research lifecycle orchestration, persistent memory scientific agent | `SKILL_autosci-memory-centric-lifecycle.md` | engineering | Multi-phase research memory layout (AutoSci arXiv 2605.31468); for Re-Act OS use agentic-react-os. |
| clinical scenario, bedside, ICU question, anestezija, anesthesiology, intenzivna, perioperative, airway, sepsis bundle, ECMO sedation, sedacija ECMO, klinički slučaj, clinical decision support, CDSS | `SKILL_clinical-cdss.md` | clinical | Use for bedside anesthesia/ICU SBAR and clinical reasoning with ECMO guardrails; wraps Clinical Decision Support subagent. NOT pharma-label CDS packages; NOT report auditing or legal contracts. |
| create skill, new skill, add skill, skill gap, skill maker, skill builder, skill-builder | `SKILL_create-skill.md` | meta | Use when a repeatable workflow needs to be captured as a new SKILL_*.md file |
| notebooklm research gate, notebooklm verify claims, ground notebooklm synthesis, notebooklm before implement, verify notebook sources, NotebookLM research gate | `SKILL_notebooklm-research-gate.md` | tools | Gate NotebookLM answers before implementation with VERIFIED/INFERRED/UNVERIFIED labels; for PubMed quick lookup use research-lookup; for formal SR use meta-analysis. |
| model-native skill, model-native skill transformation, steering vector workflow, representation engineering pipeline, activation extraction, SAE steering, latent steering | `SKILL_model-native-skill-transform.md` | engineering | Use for repeatable transformation of procedural skills into activation/steering workflows with baseline-vs-steered evaluation and reproducibility guardrails; for generic new skill authoring use create-skill. |
| blog post, blog, newsletter, Substack, LinkedIn article, thought leadership, content draft, non-academic writing, nonacademic, web article, tutorial post, case study post, piši blog, blog objava | `SKILL_nonacademic-writer.md` | writing | Use for blog, newsletter, and other non-journal prose (outline, hooks, section feedback, web-sourced citations). NOT for manuscripts, IMRaD, systematic reviews, or scholarly spec. For journal structure use manuscript-structure; for literature grids use literature-synthesis; may pair with avoid-ai-formulations or ai-detection per tier3_pairing. |
| review this paper, peer review, critique paper, analyze research article, academic paper review, arXiv review | `SKILL_academic-paper-review.md` | writing | Structured critique of one external paper; for own manuscript IMRaD check use manuscript-structure; for multi-paper synthesis use literature-synthesis. |
| document review, fact-check document, audit this PDF, proofread report, review deck | `SKILL_document-review.md` | tools | Factual/structural audit of reports and slides; for contracts use legal-contract-review; for scientific manuscript structure use manuscript-structure. |
| speech writer, TED talk, keynote, public speaking, oral presentation, conference talk script | `SKILL_presentation-speech.md` | writing | Spoken talk scripts; for blog use nonacademic-writer. |
| powerpoint accessibility, accessible presentation, PPTX audit, slide accessibility | `SKILL_powerpoint-accessibility.md` | tools | Slide deck accessibility; for publication figures use figure-pipeline. |
| research lookup, current evidence, recent studies on, what does literature say now, consensus search, consensus evidence | `SKILL_research-lookup.md` | tools | Quick cited lookup: Consensus MCP (OAuth) then PubMed for PMIDs/gaps; for SR/MA use meta-analysis; for synthesis grid use literature-synthesis (internal consensus meter is NOT Consensus.app). For arXiv skill scouting use arxiv-skill-scout. |
| meeting insights, analyze transcript, meeting summary, action items from meeting | `SKILL_meeting-insights.md` | tools | Meeting transcript analysis; not clinical CDSS. |
| write latex, create latex, latex document, latex paper, beamer, latex poster, ieee format, latex thesis, convert to latex | `SKILL_latex-document.md` | tools | LaTeX authoring and layout; for compile-only use latex-compile; for Word use document-conversion. |
| journal production, production checklist, galley proof, camera ready, typesetting, prepress, publisher production | `SKILL_journal-production.md` | tools | Post-acceptance production; for structure use manuscript-structure; for cover art use journal-cover-design. |
| journal cover, cover design, title page design, graphical abstract layout, issue cover | `SKILL_journal-cover-design.md` | tools | Cover/title-page layout; for in-article figures use figure-pipeline. |
| compile latex, compile paper, latex PDF, fix latex error, arxiv build, latexmk | `SKILL_latex-compile.md` | tools | LaTeX build only; for new documents use latex-document; for Word use document-conversion. |
| pitch deck, investor memo, one-pager, fundraising, accelerator application | `SKILL_investor-materials.md` | business | Investor-facing collateral; for blog use nonacademic-writer. |
| what if, scenario analysis, scenario planning, threat model horizon | `SKILL_scenario-planning.md` | engineering | Scenario branches; for software grill-me use grill-me. |
| trading analysis, risk manager, portfolio risk, R-multiple, position sizing | `SKILL_financial-trading.md` | finance | Trading risk; for biostatistics use test-selection or r-statistics. |
| drug discovery, diffdock, pathml, molecular docking, discovery workbench | `SKILL_drug-discovery-workbench.md` | discovery | Computational discovery; Pipeline 7B; not bedside CDSS. |
